title: ScoreTab
description: An Easy TAB footer for TPS, players, ping and World optional balance (Vault/PlaceholderAPI).
body:
## 🔴ScoreTab

ScoreTab is a modern Minecraft server plugin that adds a **clean TAB footer** with essential live server information.

It displays useful stats directly in the TAB list footer **without modifying teams, prefixes, player names or scoreboard systems**.

The plugin is built with performance and simplicity in mind and integrates cleanly into existing server setups.

---

## ✨ Features

- Displays **TPS**, **online players**, **player ping**, **current world** and optional **economy / balance** in the TAB footer
- Customizable **TAB header** since **v1.2**
- Rank-based **TAB player sorting** since **v1.3**
- Configurable sorting groups, for example **Owner**, **Admin**, **Moderator**, **VIP** and **Player**
- Permission-based group priorities using normal Bukkit permissions
- Compatible with **LuckPerms** through normal permissions
- Optional **economy / balance display** via **Vault**
- Fully configurable **header and footer lines**
- **PlaceholderAPI** support
- Reloadable configuration with `/scoretab reload`
- Multi-language support (**English** & **German**)
- Automatic config update for missing values
- Config **file-version** system for future updates
- Extremely low performance impact
- Does **not** use scoreboard teams for sorting, so it is less likely to interfere with teams or prefixes


![TabList](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513523c2b5022bf6ce4d6fee470c8c844220728f.jpeg)

![new V 1.1](https://www.mcpacks.de/daten/Screenshot%202026-03-26%20203250.png)
---

## ⚙️ Commands

- `/scoretab reload` – Reloads the configuration

---

## 🔐 Permissions

- `scoretab.admin` – Allows reloading the configuration *(default: OP)*

---

## 🧩 Optional Dependencies

- **Vault** – Required for economy / balance display
- **PlaceholderAPI** – Required for custom placeholders

---

## Check Out my other Plugins
- [InfernalForge Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/infernalforge)
- [BoatLimiter Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/boatlimiter)

- [ItemCoreX Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemcorex)

---

## 🌍 Compatibility

- Tested on **Paper 1.21.11**
- Works with **Paper** and **Spigot**

---
